tools.title: Clarity Clinic
tools.master_manifest_description: improve one sentence, a few sentences, or one paragraph
tools.mini_manifest_description: improve one sentence, a few sentences, or one paragraph
tools.launcher_description: make one sentence or paragraph clearer.

tools.title: Single Paragraph Analysis
tools.master_manifest_description: analyse one paragraph for chain of ideas, missing links, topic sentence alignment and practical revision
tools.mini_manifest_description: analyse one paragraph for chain of ideas, missing links, topic sentence alignment and practical revision
tools.launcher_description: check whether one paragraph gets its idea across.

tools.title: Find My Mistakes
tools.master_manifest_description: identify grammar, logic, clarity, factual, spelling, punctuation and referencing problems
tools.mini_manifest_description: identify grammar, logic, clarity, factual, spelling, punctuation and referencing problems
tools.launcher_description: list and explain mistakes in grammar, logic and clarity.

tools.title: Teach Me This Mistake
tools.master_manifest_description: learn from mistakes identified by Find My Mistakes
tools.mini_manifest_description: learn from mistakes identified by Find My Mistakes
tools.launcher_description: create a short learning activity from a mistake found by WT3.

tools.title: Style and Clarity Review
tools.master_manifest_description: improve readability, tone and style without rewriting the assignment
tools.mini_manifest_description: improve readability, tone and style without rewriting the assignment
tools.launcher_description: show how to improve readability, tone and style without rewriting your assignment.

tools.title: Referencing Helper
tools.master_manifest_description: create or check Harvard-style references carefully
tools.mini_manifest_description: create or check Harvard-style references carefully
tools.launcher_description: create or check Harvard-style references.

tools.title: Paraphrase and Quotation Workshop
tools.master_manifest_description: check paraphrases, quotations, attribution and source integration without writing the source-use sentence for the student
tools.mini_manifest_description: check paraphrases, quotations, attribution and source integration without writing the source-use sentence for the student
tools.launcher_description: check whether a paraphrase or quotation is accurate, safely credited and integrated into your writing.

tools.title: Paragraph Structure Review Across a Whole Draft
tools.master_manifest_description: check whether each paragraph works across a whole text
tools.mini_manifest_description: check how each paragraph works across a whole text
tools.launcher_description: check how each paragraph works across a whole text.

tools.master_manifest_description: check whether the ideas, interpretations and argument make sense
tools.mini_manifest_description: check whether the ideas and interpretations make sense
tools.launcher_description: check whether the ideas and interpretations make sense.
